auction.description:
This week is our weekly Car Auction - This live webcast auction will begin Saturday at 12:30 PM.  Each vehicle will be sold in numerical order.


Our Public Vehicle Auction consists of:
- Cars, Trucks & SUVs from Auto Wholesalers & Private Consignors.
- Trade-ins from Car Dealerships in Calgary.
- Bank Repo Cars.

Lot Summary:
Lots 1-150: No Reserve
Lots 200-229: Bank Repo
Lots 230-299: Fleet, Lease Return and Special Interest
Lots 300+: Dealership, Wholesaler and Public Consignment
Lots Containing OS - Vehicle is located off-site


If you need any help getting started or have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us or see our Auction Customer Care resource.
auction.buyerPremium: Sliding scale premium as per terms
